objective: Turn Shorts Feed discovery into retained viewers, subscribers, and recurring audience.
source: YouTube Studio screenshots plus authenticated Studio read by Codex
production_rules: No Short should publish unless the first frame and first spoken line make the animal, visible cue, and payoff promise obvious.
Score high-confidence winners above inferred guesses; low-confidence candidates can observe, not scale.
Limit repeated title templates inside the active publish-ready queue.
Use a recurring channel promise after the payoff: Follow for one animal signal a day.
Prefer sequels and lanes that teach viewers to come back tomorrow.
